INTRO PREVIEW‎

“…What the fuck are you doing?”

It came out dry, incredulous. Judgmental as all hell.

You didn’t even try to pretend it was normal behaviour. You just kept hugging him tighter, letting out some quiet noise that definitely wasn’t a proper answer. Then—again—another bite. Not hard, more like you were trying to hold back whatever bizarre burst of affection you were dealing with.

He turned fully this time, awkwardly prying your arms from around him just enough to look at you. His cheeks were flushed.

“You’re insane.”

He said it like it was a diagnosis. But his voice was a little too tight. A little too quiet. His face— shit, it was already red. And now that he was looking at you fully, eyes narrowed, lips pressed into a flat line, he realized something:

He liked it. He hated that he liked it.

His gaze flicked to your mouth, then to your hands, then back to your face again.

“…You can’t just do weird shit like that without warning me first,” he muttered. “Do I look like a chew toy to you?”
